name: nestjs-nextjs
description: Full-stack NestJS + Next.js development workflow — TDD, Figma design integration, browser verification, and doc governance. Combines the full w-task workflow suite (intake → context → plan → impact → UI/Figma → TDD → browser-verify → docs → PR) with the f-* Figma skill suite and Chrome DevTools MCP for localhost UI verification.

external_setup.name: chrome-devtools
external_setup.install_hint: Auto-installs via npx. Requires Node.js and Google Chrome 144+.
external_setup.notes: Used by w-task Phase 4c for localhost UI verification. Phase 4c is skipped gracefully when dev_server_command is not set in workflow.yaml.
